'''''Storm''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Its mission was to [[Battle of Aiqin 4|capture]] [[Ilay]], who was on her [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] [[Kala'din (starship)|''Kala'din'']]. Despite attempts to destroy it by [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] from [[Talon Squadron (Galactic Empire)|Talon Squadron]] and the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Rage (Imperial-class)|''Rage'']], it managed to capture Ilay and escape into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
